channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned vehicle/ untaxed, 11th March
item.description:
There is a vehicle which has been parked for months. it’s untaxed also.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitebeam Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside 1, Eastmead Close not working., 11th March
item.description:
Street light outside 1 Eastmead Close, BR1 2JG is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter strewn everywhere, 11th March
item.description:
There is litter everywhere in the underpass. It makes our neighbourhood look appealing, uncared for and unsafe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Fly tipping of bulky bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes in the middle of the road outside no 1 Abbey Crescent. The holes are getting bigger due to major building works taking place with large lorries, diggers coming in and out and using the junction of Kentish Road as a turning point. The potholes cannot be avoided as cars are parked both sides of the road. The pavement can also not be used during extensive rain as the drains overflow. Pedestrians have no option but to cross the road which means dodging the holes. Please repair ASAP. Thanks!!, 11th March
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Crescent, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car consistently parking illegally in park, 11th March
item.description:
This car regularly parks on the grass in the park next to Alexis street near one of the street lamps. This damages the grass and often leaves unsightly tire tracks in a shared public space. I would say this happens 10+ times a month. Please can this be reported and the owner fined? It’s really antisocial and not fair on those using the park appropriately. Thanks so much! :)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Moped/Scooter - left outside the bicycle park/storage area at Walthamstow Central Station - been there several weeks., 11th March
item.description:
Moped/Scooter - left outside the bicycle park/storage area at Walthamstow Central Station - been there several weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large and deep pothole, 11th March
item.description:
I lost the wheel of my motorcycle into the pothole, thankfully did not fall off, and there is no damage to the bike. But very nearly had an accident. This would be worse for a pedal cycle. The hole as you can see is larger than my hand in length and diameter, and between 1 inch to 2 inches deep. Surprised is hasn't either been reported or caused an incident already.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallhouse Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Essex Road full of potholes, 11th March
item.description:
Almost the entirety of Essex Road is dangerous for all road users because of the prevalence of major potholes. A major cycling route; someone will be seriously injured.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Essex Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage Problem, 11th March
item.description:
The drainage issue still hasn’t been resolved. During heavy rain, the road becomes flooded. The rainwater is not draining into the road drain as it should. Pembroke Road has a history of dangerous flooding caused by poor maintenance by the council and Thames Water. The problem has not been fixed!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Flytipping .The usual mess of black bags of smelly food and bed bases near 22 Ceres Road and opposite Nr 50 .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned food delivery crates, 11th March
item.description:
These appeared last Friday and have been there all the week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakwood Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Hazelmere, 11th March

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Flytipping, 11th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dowlas Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox on Beckenham green, 11th March
item.description:
North East corner of Beckenham Green in front of yoga studio and Coop, there is a dead fox, report to Veolla in person Tuesday 10 am. Please remove it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep mud in parking space, 11th March
item.description:
Not sure where the correct place to report this is, i would really apprecoate some help. The parking on melbury driver is always full and usually the parking space left is full of mud which makes it close to impossible to get in and out of the vehicle without being filled or slipping in the mud. I have slipped a few times getting into the car ans im disabled so it isnt ideal for my mobility genrally. I believe this area just simply became out of hand over the winter and now it has become dangerous and to an extent almost unusable. I would be really grateful if this fairly deep mud could be cleared. It is located at thw back wall of melbury drive in the middle parking space (very easy to spot as in front there is a massive puddle that doesnt seem to evapurate) Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Melbury Drive, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Display board not working, 11th March
item.description:
Northbound bus stop at the O2 centre. The electronic display board has not been working for some time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 239, Finchley Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Rubbish, 11th March
item.description:
Bags of rubbish and other items dumped at various points along the hill, by the cemetary wall.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lodge Hill, Welling
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting you did some work on that lighting in January this year, 11th March
item.description:
Lighting and camera at the back is there a reason you have put a camera in front of my home bedroom direct view to my bedroom and home. I do need to pull my curtains for light to come in my home as I have a medical condition.And your parking attendant is always ref to this. And lightning is shiny to bright at night keeping me awake same lamp post is it possible cameras are remove because of privacy to my home.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Leathwell Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak, 11th March
item.description:
Water gushing out of Thames Water leak and running down the hill. Looks like clean water. In front of Red Hill 6, right across the road from Red Hill primary school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
